## 📝 Description

Brief description of changes made in this pull request.

## 🎯 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update (changes to documentation only)
- [ ] 🔧 Refactoring (no functional changes, code improvements)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔒 Security enhancement

## 🧪 Testing

- [ ] ✅ Unit tests added/updated and passing
- [ ] ✅ Integration tests added/updated and passing
- [ ] ✅ All existing tests still pass
- [ ] ✅ Manual testing completed
- [ ] ✅ Performance testing completed (if applicable)

## 🔒 Security

- [ ] ✅ Input validation implemented
- [ ] ✅ Error handling is secure (no sensitive data exposed)
- [ ] ✅ No new security vulnerabilities introduced
- [ ] ✅ Security tests added/updated

## 📚 Documentation

- [ ] ✅ Javadoc updated for all public APIs
- [ ] ✅ README updated if needed
- [ ] ✅ API documentation updated
- [ ] ✅ Configuration examples updated
- [ ] ✅ Migration guide updated (if breaking change)

## 📋 Checklist

- [ ] ✅ Code follows [Cursor IDE Rules](CURSOR_IDE_RULES.md)
- [ ] ✅ 90%+ test coverage maintained
- [ ] ✅ No TODO/FIXME comments without issue references — run `scripts/find_todos.sh` and attach `docs/TODO_SCAN.md` if any matches are found
- [ ] ✅ Dependencies properly versioned
- [ ] ✅ Code formatted with Spotless
- [ ] ✅ Checkstyle validation passes
- [ ] ✅ No compiler warnings
- [ ] ✅ No unused imports
- [ ] ✅ No dead code

Notes:
- TODOs in generated or vendor files are allowed but must be documented in the PR description with a rationale.

## 🔗 Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)
Fixes #(issue number)
Related to #(issue number)

## 📊 Performance Impact

- **Before**: Performance metrics before changes
- **After**: Performance metrics after changes
- **Impact**: Description of performance impact

## 🔄 Breaking Changes

If this is a breaking change, describe:
- What changed
- Why it changed
- How to migrate

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to show the changes.

## 🧪 Test Instructions

Instructions for testing this change:

1. Checkout this branch
2. Run `mvn clean install`
3. Run `mvn test`
4. Test the specific functionality
5. Verify the changes work as expected

## 📝 Additional Notes

Any additional information that reviewers should know.

---

**Note:** Please ensure all code follows our [coding standards](CURSOR_IDE_RULES.md) and that all tests pass before submitting.
